arts.ttl: Ibrahimovic blesses potential Rashford-Milan move as club awaits signal from Manchester United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has emerged as an ideal target for AC Milan's January transfer window ambitions. The versatile English forward fits the profile of what the Rossoneri are seeking - a player capable of operating across the front three positions in a 4-3-3 formation and guaranteeing double-digit goal returns. arts.ttl: AC Milan considering loan move for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: AC Milan are considering an approach to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford on loan this month. Rashford is expected to leave Manchester United in the January transfer window having expressed a desire for a new challenge.
